languages.text: [Осуждающе покачать головой] "Не ожидал{mf||а} от тебя столь резких заявлений в адрес черни".
[Shake your head in disapproval] "I did not expect to hear such harsh statements from you about the common people."
languages.original_text: [Осуждающе покачать головой] "Не ожидал{mf||а} от тебя столь резких заявлений в адрес черни".

traits.locale_text: [Shake your head in disapproval] "I did not expect to hear such harsh statements from you about the common people."

[Shake your head in disapproval] "I did not expect to hear such harsh statements from you about the common people."

languages.text: [Menear la cabeza en gesto de desaprobación] «No esperaba oírle hablar con tal dureza sobre la plebe».
languages.original_text: [Shake your head in disapproval] "I did not expect to hear such harsh statements from you about the common people."

traits.locale_text: [Menear la cabeza en gesto de desaprobación] «No esperaba oírle hablar con tal dureza sobre la plebe».

languages.text: 【不以为然地摇摇头】“我真没想到，你竟会这么刻薄地评论普通民众。”
languages.original_text: [Shake your head in disapproval] "I did not expect to hear such harsh statements from you about the common people."

traits.locale_text: 【不以为然地摇摇头】“我真没想到，你竟会这么刻薄地评论普通民众。”

languages.text: [Secouer la tête d'un air désapprobateur] « Je ne m'attendais pas à des paroles aussi dures de votre part sur la populace. »
languages.original_text: [Shake your head in disapproval] "I did not expect to hear such harsh statements from you about the common people."

traits.locale_text: [Secouer la tête d'un air désapprobateur] « Je ne m'attendais pas à des paroles aussi dures de votre part sur la populace. »

languages.text: [Onaylamadığını belli edecek şekilde başını salla] "Sıradan halk hakkında senden böyle sert ifadeler duymayı beklemezdim."
languages.original_text: [Shake your head in disapproval] "I did not expect to hear such harsh statements from you about the common people."

traits.locale_text: [Onaylamadığını belli edecek şekilde başını salla] "Sıradan halk hakkında senden böyle sert ifadeler duymayı beklemezdim."

languages.text: ［不満げに首を振る］「君の口からそのような庶民への手厳しい言葉を聞くとは思わなかった」
languages.original_text: [Shake your head in disapproval] "I did not expect to hear such harsh statements from you about the common people."

traits.locale_text: ［不満げに首を振る］「君の口からそのような庶民への手厳しい言葉を聞くとは思わなかった」

languages.text: [Missbilligend den Kopf schütteln] "Ich hatte keine so harten Aussagen über die einfachen Leute von Euch erwartet."
languages.original_text: [Shake your head in disapproval] "I did not expect to hear such harsh statements from you about the common people."

traits.locale_text: [Missbilligend den Kopf schütteln] "Ich hatte keine so harten Aussagen über die einfachen Leute von Euch erwartet."
